title: Project MINT Modpack
description: This is the Official Modpack for the Project MINT Cobblemon server!
body:
Welcome to Project MINT, a community driven Cobblemon server with an array of features to enhance your experience with us!

Server IP: play.projectmintmc.com

Discord: https://discord.gg/projectmintmc

Store: https://store.projectmintmc.com/

Project MINT is a Cobblemon based modded Minecraft server made for players who want a relaxed, welcoming and healthy community. Whether you're here to catch 'em all, build something amazing or just vibe with friends, this is the place for you.

Our store offers a variety of optional in-game goodies like ranks, crates and cosmetics all designed to enhance your experience. Every purchase helps us to cover server costs, improve performance and bring new features that will help keep the server fresh and exciting.

I hope you'll join our community and I look forward to seeing you on Project MINT!

We are licensed to use the Complete Cobblemon Collection in our Modpack!
